parts.answer: An answer including the following points : • {all 3 / both} inhibit bacterial growth in all (4) bacteria (1) • methanol extract more effective than both chemicals (1) • (in each case) the effect of the methanol extract is more than the sum of the effect of the two chemicals (1) • there may be other anti-microbial chemicals in the methanol extract / the two chemicals work together to produce an effects greater than their sum (synergy) (1) (4) Number Answer Additional Guidance Mark

An answer including three of the following: Placebos • it is used as a control / more validity (1) • to {eliminate} / account for} a psychological effect (of taking the drug) (1) Double-blind trials • so that {doctor / scientist} does not know if the treatment contains the (new) drug or not (1) • to remove bias from results (1) e.g. comparison with the actual drug Accept to {eliminate} / account for} a psychological effect (of administering the drug) (3) Number Answer Additional Guidance Mark An answer that includes the following steps: • reading of diameter using scale (1) • width calculated (1) Example of calculation: 19 units So actual width is 19 x 3 = 57 (μm) correct answer with no working gains both Accept diameters from 15 to 20 units (2) Number Answer Additional Guidance Mark An answer that includes the following points : • xylem (1) • sclerenchyma (1) Mark first answer on each line (2) Number Answer Additional Guidance Mark • fibre variables taken into account (1) • appropriate environmental variable controlled (1) • appropriate description of how masses are added (1) • adding masses until fibre breaks / measure the mass that {breaks the fibre / that the fibre can hold before breaking} (1) e.g. length, age, mass, hydration level, plant extracted from e.g. temperature, humidity, distance between stands e.g. one at a time, gently (4) Number Answer Additional Guidance Mark following features: A axes correct (x – diameter, y – tensile strength) (1) L axes correctly labelled and with units (1) P correct plotting on a linear scale on y (1) S points joined with straight lines. (1) (4) Tensile Strength / Mpa Diameter / μm Number Answer Additional Mark An answer including three of the following points : • the larger the diameter the less tensile strength / negative correlation (1) • non-linear (1) • steepest decrease {between 21 μm and 25 μm / up to 25 μm} (1) • less steep from {25–81 μm / 81-84 μm } (1) Accept reverse (3) Number Answer Additional Guidance Mark • al
